mapper.select: SELECT STATION_NO , STATION_NAME , CHARGER_NO , C.STATUS , S.STATUS AS STATION_STATUS FROM CHARGER C JOIN STATION S USING(STATION_NO) ORDER BY STATION_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT STATION_NAME , S.STATUS AS STATION_STATUS FROM CHARGER C JOIN STATION S USING(STATION_NO) WHERE STATION_NO = #{stationNo} AND ROWNUM = 1;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHARGER ( CHARGER_NO , STATUS , STATION_NO ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHARGER.NEXTVAL , 'Y' , #{stationNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT STATION_NO FROM CHARGER WHERE CHARGER_NO = #{chargerNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE CHARGER SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE CHARGER_NO = #{chargerNo}
